<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Get Forecasting Units for Dataset"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/api/forecastingUnit/programId/{programId}/versionId/{versionId}"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Retrieve a list of active forecasting units for a given dataset, identified by its program ID and version ID.

<Heading
  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
  children={"Request"}
>
</Heading>

<ParamsDetails
  parameters={[{"description":"The ID of the program","in":"path","name":"programId","required":true,"schema":{"type":"integer","format":"int32"}},{"description":"The ID of the version","in":"path","name":"versionId","required":true,"schema":{"type":"integer","format":"int32"}}]}
>
  
</ParamsDetails>

<RequestSchema
  title={"Body"}
  body={undefined}
>
  
</RequestSchema>

<StatusCodes
  id={undefined}
  label={undefined}
  responses={{"200":{"content":{"text/json":{"schema":{"type":"array","items":{"type":"object","properties":{"id":{"type":"integer","format":"int32"},"idString":{"type":"string"},"label":{"type":"object","properties":{"baseModel":{"type":"object","properties":{"baseModel":"circular(BaseModel_ReportView)"},"title":"BaseModel_ReportView"},"label_en":{"type":"string"},"label_fr":{"type":"string"},"label_pr":{"type":"string"},"label_sp":{"type":"string"}},"title":"Label_ReportView"}},"title":"SimpleObject_ReportView"}}}},"description":"Returns the ForecastingUnit list"},"404":{"content":{"text/json":{"schema":{"type":"object","properties":{"messageCode":{"type":"string"}},"title":"ResponseCode_ReportView"}}},"description":"No forecasting units found for the given dataset"},"500":{"content":{"text/json":{"schema":{"type":"object","properties":{"messageCode":{"type":"string"}},"title":"ResponseCode_ReportView"}}},"description":"Internal error while listing forecasting units"}}}
>
  
</StatusCodes>
